columns.extraction_plan: The percentage of participants in the SOC + AAP (treatment) arm who received docetaxel within 1 year after first disease progression is reported in the text. The exact count (N) is not explicitly provided, but the percentage is given.

The percentage of participants in the SOC-alone (control) arm who received docetaxel within 1 year after first disease progression is reported in the text. The exact count (N) is not explicitly provided, but the percentage is given.
